name: awesome-agent-team
description: Spawn a real Claude Code Agent Team. A Project Manager brainstorms your goal, generates project-specific worker roles, then assembles persistent teammates via TeamCreate with randomized names and personalities.

plugins.name: awesome-agent-team
plugins.description: Slash command /start-team that orchestrates the full PM-led team workflow on top of Claude Code's experimental Agent Teams (TeamCreate / SendMessage / shared TaskList).
